channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Litter all over the street - Opposite 119 Athenlay Road, Nunhead, 3rd May
item.description:
A blue sealed litter bag was left out on the street/ public highway and its contents have been spilled all over the street.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Athenlay Road, Nunhead, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytipping, 3rd May
item.description:
Flat pack furniture dumped in front of bin store . This location has rubbish dumped weekly.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Mycenae Road, Blackheath
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Unreal parking, 3rd May
item.description:
Nbb

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Abbey Street, Old Kent Road, Greater London

item.title: Abandond hire bikes parked dangerously, 3rd May

Abandond hire bikes parked dangerously the pavement. Swiss court TWG Tea.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Whitcomb Street, Covent Garden, City of Westminster

item.title: Dumped garden waste, 3rd May
item.description:
This area on the grass verge continually has garden waste dumped.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Combe Avenue, Blackheath
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Timber bollard knocked over & paving broken, 3rd May
item.description:
A vehicle has knocked over one of the pavement side bollards and as a result has smashed all the paving and left a hole and dangerous uneven surface at the point of pedestrian crossing.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Vanbrugh Fields, Blackheath
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Car parking on double yellows, blocking bin shed, and two car parks, 3rd May
item.description:
Car parked on double yellow, blocks 2 car parks and the bin shed

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Page's Walk, Old Kent Road, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytipping, 3rd May
item.description:
See image, litter everywhere across Rollins str.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Rollins Street, New Cross Gate, Greater London

item.title: Large and deep pothole has appeared is quite wide and deep, 3rd May
item.description:
A large pothole has formed and is quite large and wide . Buses have to avoid as it is big
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Southern Way, Greenwich

item.title: Debris on pavement and road following car crash, 3rd May
item.description:
A car crashed into a lamp post 2 weeks ago but there is still debris on the road and pavement all along plough way. Broken glass, plastics, rubber, sand etc have blown along the entire street. Please send a road cleaner and pavement cleaners to clean Plough Way from Sweden Gate to Windsock Close
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 151-153, Plough Way, Rotherhithe, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Gas bottle dumped in front of 35 Frederick Place, 3rd May
item.description:
Photos taken 3rd May 2026

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Frederick Place, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Litter on Tabard street, 3rd May
item.description:
There are cans, food packaging, plastic bags, plastic bottles and paper on the road and pavement on Tabard street alongside the park and student building. It has been there three days.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Tabard Street, The Borough, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Speaker dumped on pavement opposite 45 Wrottesley Road, 3rd May
item.description:
Photos taken 3rd May 2026.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Wrottesley Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pinnned, 3rd May
item.description:
Graff out

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Brondesbury Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Car possibly abandoned, 3rd May
item.description:
This car appears to be Polish in origin. It has been parked outside my house since approx 2pm with its lights and indicator on. Now it is dark the lights are shining into my house

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 21, Rookery Gardens, Poverest, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Continual dumping of building waste, 3rd May
item.description:
Ongoing, often 2 or 3 times per week, of building waste. This is in rubble sacks, including timber etc and seems to be refuse left by tradespeople. This problem, in this precise area, is getting worse and worse. Can we please have some proper enforcement.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Clarence Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Give Way and Single "White Road Markings" Faint, 3rd May
item.description:
The "White Give Way and Single White Road Markings" has been faint for several months and are in need of repainting as soonest please. This is on junction of Park Road and along Park Grove. Be very much appreciated if can be attended as high priority under road safety. Thank you in advance. Submitted Sunday 3rd May 2026.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 19, Park Road, Plaistow, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
